helpful: fedcourts paths resolved the snapshot/event locations cleanly
fedcourts query ran offline and returned ranked priors
gaps: No cert-stage base-rate prior: corpus query returns historical published opinions whose disposition labels track merits outcomes, not cert grant/deny, so it offers no usable base rate for SCOTUS certiorari petitions
A --docket-number / docket-class signal (paid vs in forma pauperis) would let a predictor key on the strongest available structural prior
No way to filter priors to discretionary cert dispositions specifically
notes: Snapshot was sparse (no docket entries, no cert grant/deny dates), so the prediction rests on the SCOTUS cert base rate plus the IFP docket-number signal (01-8924) as legal context rather than on corpus priors.
